idea: promote LHS tensor map to L2_128B
justification: baseline ncu shows occupancy-limited small shape; modest L2 help may reduce refill latency without changing structure

idea: promote LHS and metadata tensor maps to L2_256B
justification: small M/N may benefit from reusing compact lhs/meta descriptors in L2
single-block occupancy may benefit from explicit compiler residency guidance

idea: promote both RHS tensor maps to L2_128B
justification: tiny N implies rhs tiles are small enough for reuse in L2

idea: tighten warpgroup wait depth from 1 to 0
justification: latency bias may help this occupancy-limited kernel

idea: insert producer nanosleep(100) after full-stage barrier arrival
justification: producer pacing can reduce pressure with one resident block per SM

idea: port META_TILE_COLS=8 plus double producer nanosleep from 4096x4096 winner
justification: winning K=4096 square-shape structure may transfer to this smaller square-like regime

idea: promote output tensor map to L2_256B
justification: small output tile may benefit from write-side locality hints

idea: insert producer nanosleep(100) after metadata barrier arrival
justification: brief delay may align subsequent TMA issue after metadata arrival
tiny N can change bank-conflict tradeoffs; retest pad removal
